title: The Immortal Zugzwang Game
blurb: Copenhagen, 1923. You are Aron Nimzowitsch, prophet of prophylaxis, playing Black. No mate is coming and you will finish a piece down for two pawns — yet after your final quiet move, White has a full board of pieces and not a single move that doesn't lose. Resignation by suffocation: the Immortal Zugzwang.
